title: Test: Add property-based testing
original_text: Added property-based testing using Hypothesis. Created property tests for data validation functions. Implemented property tests for mathematical operations. Added property tests for serialization/deserialization. Implemented property tests for state transitions. Added property test coverage reporting. Result: property tests pass.
expected_subject: test(quality): add property-based testing with Hypothesis
expected_body_lines: - Create property tests for data validation functions
- Implement property tests for mathematical operations
- Implement property tests for state transitions
expected_command: git commit -m "test(quality): add property-based testing with Hypothesis"
